title: Consistent Naming: Zombie Hoglins
description: A simple pack that renames Zoglins to Zombie Hoglins, matching the naming scheme of the other zombie mobs!
body:
A simple pack that renames Zoglins to Zombie Hoglins, matching the naming scheme of the other zombie mobs!

I also have a pack that changes the names of Zoglins to Zombified Hoglins to match the Zombified Piglin! Check it out here: [https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/consistent-naming-zombified-hoglins](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/consistent-naming-zombified-hoglins)
